items.title: Approval queue now supports release-level grouping
items.body: Teams can batch related approvals together so launches are easier to scan before sign-off.

items.title: Executive summary widgets added to workspace home
items.body: Leads can see risk, review load, and delivery health without opening extra panels.

items.title: New webhook endpoint for release status sync
items.body: Ops tools can now push scheduled or delayed release changes directly into the product feed.
